title: Session never refreshed after bootstrap; stale session violates RFC 8620 §2
description: client_task.rs fetches session once at startup (line 106-118) and never re-fetches it. RFC 8620 §2 requires clients to re-fetch the session on 401, unknownCapability errors, or changed session state. If server rotates tokens, adds accounts, or changes capabilities (e.g. enables WebSocket after upgrade), client uses stale api_url/ws_url indefinitely until process restart. JMAP calls may silently hit wrong endpoints or receive accountNotFound errors.
close_reason: Deferred: requires architectural refactoring — session mutable, refresh signals threaded through 18+ call sites, SSE/WS reconnect on URL changes. Too large for review-loop pass. Tracked separately if needed.
